errors.name: inspect-nonexistent
errors.description: Unknown session ID passed to inspect
errors.stderr: {"error":"not found: nonexistent123","exit_code":3,"ok":false}

errors.name: inspect-nonexistent-human
errors.description: Unknown session ID passed to inspect (human mode)
errors.stderr:
What went wrong: Session `nonexistent123` was not found.
Example: gaal inspect latest -H
Hint: List recent sessions with `gaal ls --since 7d -H`, then rerun `gaal inspect` with a valid 8-character ID prefix.

errors.name: transcript-nonexistent
errors.description: Unknown session ID passed to transcript
errors.stderr: {"error":"not found: nonexistent123; hint: run 'gaal ls' to see available sessions","exit_code":3,"ok":false}

errors.name: transcript-nonexistent-human
errors.description: Unknown session ID passed to transcript (human mode)
errors.stderr:
What went wrong: Session `nonexistent123; hint: run 'gaal ls' to see available sessions` was not found, so no transcript could be generated.
Example: gaal transcript latest -H
Hint: List recent sessions with `gaal ls --since 7d -H`, then rerun `gaal transcript` with a valid session ID.

errors.name: who-no-verb
errors.description: Missing verb in who command — target without action
errors.stderr: {"error":"parse error: invalid who verb: docs.md (expected: read|wrote|ran|touched|changed|deleted)","exit_code":11,"ok":false}

errors.name: who-no-verb-human
errors.description: Missing verb in who command (human mode)
errors.stderr:
What went wrong: The `who` command needs a verb such as `read`, `wrote`, or `ran`.
Example: gaal who ran cargo --since 7d -H
Hint: Choose one supported verb, then provide an optional target to narrow the match.

errors.name: who-invalid-verb
errors.description: Invalid verb in who command
errors.stderr: {"error":"parse error: invalid who verb: ate (expected: read|wrote|ran|touched|changed|deleted)","exit_code":11,"ok":false}

errors.name: inspect-no-selector
errors.description: Inspect with no ID, no --ids, no --tag
errors.stderr: {"error":"parse error: inspect requires a session id, `latest`, --ids, or --tag","exit_code":11,"ok":false}

errors.name: transcript-no-id
errors.description: Transcript with no ID prints help (exits 0)
errors.stderr:
gaal transcript — Get session transcript markdown (replaces inspect --markdown)

Usage: gaal transcript <session-id> [flags]

Arguments:
  <session-id>    Session ID, ID prefix, or `latest`

Flags:
  --force         Re-render even if cached markdown exists
  --stdout        Print markdown to stdout (no JSON wrapper)
  -H, --human     Print a human-readable summary instead of JSON

Examples:
  gaal transcript latest
  gaal transcript 249aad1e
  gaal transcript latest --stdout
  gaal transcript latest --force
  gaal ls    # if session resolution fails

errors.name: recall-no-args
errors.description: recall with no args prints help and exits 0
errors.stderr:
gaal recall — Ranked session retrieval for continuity and context

Usage: gaal recall <query> [flags]

Flags:
  --days-back <n>    Recency window in days (default: 14)
  --limit <n>        Max number of sessions to return (default: 3)
  --format <fmt>     Output format: summary, brief, handoff, full, eywa (default: brief)
  --substance <n>    Minimum substance score (default: 1)
  -H                 Human-readable output

Examples:
  gaal recall "gaussian moat" -H
  gaal recall "auth migration" --days-back 30 --limit 5
  gaal recall "deploy" --format handoff
